channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: US Banks Face New Open Banking Rule: A Boost to Competition and Consumer Power
item.description: The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau finalizes a rule that will give consumers access to their financial data, aiming to fuel competition and improve services for loans and credit cards.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: xAI Unveils API Service for Grok Models: A New Path in Generative AI
item.description: xAI, a generative AI venture backed by Elon Musk, has launched an API service for its Grok models. This move is aimed at competing with OpenAI and providing developers with access to large language models.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
